query: wrap up the hotfix — merge to main, tag, archive. don't let me forget anything.

query: I'm starting a new L-size feature — set me up with branch and project tracking
note: Starting work — autopilot:dev-flow at L-1, not finish-flow (which is for L-5)

query: we're at phase 3 of 5, just finished implementing — what's next?
note: Mid-phase work — not closing yet; dev-flow phase advancement

query: the integration tests are failing on CI — debug what's broken
review the diff before I merge — what looks risky?
